ick_pre_cho_elements: Rhythm On: clock and sound category
Cosmic origin: movement stretching to edge
Ringing and stretching: migration through joints

0.name: Electronic/Dance
0.description: Synth‑driven, strong beat, 4/4 time, high energy

2.name: Hip‑Hop / Rap
2.description: Rhythmic spoken vocals, strong back‑beat, often 4/4

4.name: Classical / Orchestral
4.description: Acoustic orchestration, varied tempo, often multi‑section

5.name: Latin / World
5.description: Afro‑Cuban, Bossa‑Nova, reggaeton rhythms, syncopated percussion

7.name: R&B / Soul
7.description: Smooth vocal lines, groove‑oriented rhythm, rich harmonies

8.name: Metal / Hard‑Rock
8.description: Distorted guitars, aggressive drums, often odd‑time signatures

9.name: Ambient / Experimental
9.description: Texture‑focused, low rhythm density, atmospheric sound‑scapes
